# Transcrição: 1. Don't Know What I Want- If you Did Know 

- **Fonte:** 1. Don't Know What I Want- If you Did Know 
- **Duração:** 00:15
- **Idioma:** en
- **Modelo:** small

---

## [00:00 - 00:15]

Okay, your customer, your client, your prospect just said, I don't know what I want. Try this. If you did know what you wanted, you were completely clear on what you wanted, what do you think that would be? This will work more often than not.
